summary: Moved ReadinessRules nudge presentation copy out of Core/Domain. ReadinessRules.Nudge now carries a semantic Kind plus suggestedMaxPriorities; TodayView maps each kind to a localized today.readiness.nudge.* string. Added 9 readiness nudge keys across all 19 supported Localizable.strings files with LLM-drafted values. Updated ReadinessRulesTests and CalibrationRulesTests to assert semantic kinds and priority limits instead of English message substrings. Also corrected this slice's queue metadata to include the explicitly required readiness/calibration test files and realistic all-locale resource fan-out.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-helper-followup-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: ReadinessRules.Nudge carried preformatted English message text in Core/Domain, and TodayView rendered nudge.message directly. Domain tests asserted English substrings.
contract_status_changes.after: ReadinessRules.Nudge carries semantic Kind and suggestedMaxPriorities only. TodayView owns the visible message mapping through today.readiness.nudge.* keys. Readiness and calibration tests assert semantic kind values and priorities instead of English copy.
proof: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-helper-followup-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

residual_risks: New non-English today.readiness.nudge.* values are LLM-drafted and have not been native-reviewed.
No running-app smoke, screenshot proof, physical-device proof, or TestFlight proof was run for this copy surface.
Train validation was not run because this slice does not touch Train code or Train-owned readiness presentation.
recommended_next_reason: CalibrationRules is the adjacent queued helper-generated domain-copy follow-up. It still owns writingPipelineNudge and trainingConsistencySummary English presentation copy in Core/Domain and can follow the same semantic-data plus Today/feature formatting pattern.
